response.justification: Despite an extensive and impressive career spanning decades and multiple senior roles, the candidate falsely claims current employment at Stripe and Shopify (with future-dated start dates), which severely undermines credibility. Their resume reads as a senior or staff engineer, not a junior/mid-level candidate, and they lack clear evidence of React, Nest.js, PostgreSQL, or renewable energy domain experience — all required for the role. High on-site presence is also unlikely given their apparent seniority and lack of German proficiency.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript and Node.js
Strong open-source contributions and technical teaching background
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and architectures
concerns: Falsified current employment at Stripe and Shopify (future dates)
Overqualified and misaligned with junior/mid-level role expectations
No demonstrated experience with PostgreSQL, React, Nest.js, or renewable energy domain

key_factors.factor: Lack of required tech stack experience
